opportunities.title: [Hiring] Need people to work managing social media accounts in instagram and tiktok, 150$ or more, weekly
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Need people to work managing social media accounts in instagram and tiktok, 150$ or more, weekly

We're are looking for people based in the Europe, America (including colombia, mexico and brasil) and Canada , to work as social media account managers for Tokportal We dont need specific skills or previous experience as we provide all the training material, which is spread across all the tasks and you can start to work immediately This is a remote role, working with clients operating across these markets. Payment: -Your work gets paid weekly. -Average payment ranges from 150$ a week upwa
opportunities.llm_fit_note: [REJECT] Role is for social media management, not aligned with candidate's software development expertise.
